infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Vertical to access your photo library to add photos of buildings and watch verification shots.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Vertical to use the camera to take photos of buildings and watch verification shots.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Vertical to access your photo library to add building photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Vertical to use the camera to take building photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location to find nearby HDB blocks.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location to find nearby HDB blocks.
